shopify_wyg_0: Real-time revenue and order count dashboard
shopify_wyg_1: Product performance: revenue, units, refund rate per SKU
shopify_wyg_2: Customer analytics: new vs returning, LTV, repeat rate
shopify_wyg_3: Inventory alerts: low stock and overstock detection
shopify_wyg_5: Daily briefing with your Shopify highlights
shopify_step_2: Authorise AskBiz in the Shopify app permissions screen
shopify_step_3: Your data syncs automatically — first results in under 2 minutes
amazon_wyg_0: Sales by ASIN, category, and marketplace
amazon_wyg_1: Amazon Advertising: spend, ACOS, ROAS by campaign
amazon_wyg_2: FBA inventory levels and restock alerts
amazon_wyg_3: Bestseller rank tracking for key ASINs
amazon_step_0: Select Amazon Seller Central from the integrations list
amazon_step_1: Log into Seller Central and authorise AskBiz access
amazon_step_2: Select which marketplaces to sync (UK, US, EU, etc.)
amazon_step_3: Data syncs daily — advertising data updates every 12 hours
xero_wyg_0: Daily P&L summary: revenue, gross margin, net profit
xero_wyg_1: Cash position and 30/60/90-day cash flow forecast
xero_wyg_2: Overdue invoices and debtor aging report
xero_wyg_3: Gross margin by product or service line
xero_wyg_4: Expense tracking and cost trend alerts
xero_step_0: Select Xero from the integrations list
xero_step_1: Log into your Xero account and authorise AskBiz
xero_step_2: Select the Xero organisation to connect
xero_step_3: Your financial data syncs overnight — P&L visible the next morning
stripe_wyg_0: MRR and ARR calculated from your active subscriptions
stripe_wyg_1: Churn rate: logo churn and revenue churn
stripe_wyg_2: Expansion MRR from upgrades and additional seats
stripe_wyg_3: Failed payment rate and recovery rate
stripe_wyg_4: Payment volume by product and plan
stripe_step_0: Select Stripe from the integrations list
stripe_step_2: AskBiz imports your subscription and payment history
stripe_step_3: Metrics calculated immediately — MRR visible within minutes
meta_ads_wyg_0: Ad spend, impressions, clicks, and conversions by campaign
meta_ads_wyg_1: ROAS and CPA by campaign and ad set
meta_ads_wyg_3: Budget pacing alerts — know when campaigns are over- or under-spending
meta_ads_step_0: Select Meta Ads from the integrations list
meta_ads_step_2: Select the ad accounts to sync
meta_ads_step_3: Data syncs every 6 hours — yesterday's performance visible each morning
google_ads_wyg_0: Spend, impressions, clicks, and conversions by campaign
google_ads_wyg_1: ROAS and CPA by campaign and keyword
google_ads_wyg_2: Quality Score tracking for key keywords
google_ads_wyg_3: Search impression share and lost impression share
google_ads_step_0: Select Google Ads from the integrations list
google_ads_step_1: Sign in with your Google account
google_ads_step_2: Select the Google Ads account to connect
google_ads_step_3: Data syncs daily — campaign performance visible each morning
woocommerce_wyg_1: Product performance: sales, refunds, and margin per SKU
woocommerce_wyg_2: Customer analytics: new vs returning, AOV, LTV
woocommerce_wyg_4: Refund and return rate by product
woocommerce_wyg_5: Daily briefing with your WooCommerce highlights
woocommerce_step_0: Select WooCommerce from the integrations list
woocommerce_step_2: Generate a WooCommerce REST API key and enter it in AskBiz
quickbooks_wyg_0: Revenue and expense summary: this week, this month, this year
quickbooks_wyg_1: Outstanding invoices by customer and age
quickbooks_wyg_2: Cash flow forecast based on receivables and payables
quickbooks_wyg_3: Profit and loss by class or location
quickbooks_wyg_4: Expense category breakdown and trend alerts
quickbooks_step_0: Select QuickBooks Online from the integrations list
quickbooks_step_1: Sign in with your Intuit account
quickbooks_step_2: Authorise AskBiz to read your QuickBooks data
quickbooks_step_3: Financial data syncs daily from that point forward
